item.name: Gugrusaurus
item.description:
Spends most of its life attempting to slaughter anything and everything that it catches sight of. Considering the ample opportunities to practice such skills, it has become rather good at it.

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: Known to possess a certain low cunning, and has been reported to ram smaller craft in the hopes of knocking the occupants overboard. Lalafells are particularly vulnerable to such attacks and it is advised that they tie a rope around their waist to avoid becoming this wavekin's luncheon.
